            \makecell[{{p{\linewidth}}}]{
                \texttt{\tiny{[P1$\langle$GM]}}
                \texttt{You are in a garden now. There are a nightshade, a garden bench and a bucket of water. The nightshade is on the floor. The bucket of water is on the floor. There are passages to a storage room and a outhouse here.} \\
            }
        }
    }
     \\ \\

    \theutterance \stepcounter{utterance}  
    & \multicolumn{4}{p{0.6\linewidth}}{
        \cellcolor[rgb]{0.561,0.737,0.561}{
            \makecell[{{p{\linewidth}}}]{
                \texttt{\tiny{[P1$\rangle$GM]}}
                \texttt{> take nightshade<ctrl46>} \\
\texttt{user} \\
\texttt{You take the nightshade. In your inventory you have a book and a nightshade.} \\
\texttt{\_} \\
\texttt{{[}The game is still running. Please continue.{]}} \\
